atomic_ptr_t(3) Library Functions Manual atomic_ptr_t(3)

NAME

atomic_ptr_t - Atomic pointer wrapper.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/atomic.h>

Public Member Functions


_Atomic (void *) impl
Underlying C11 atomic pointer.

Data Fields


uint64_t last_store_time_ns
uint64_t last_load_time_ns
uint64_t store_count
uint64_t load_count
uint64_t cas_count
uint64_t cas_success_count
uint64_t exchange_count

Detailed Description

Atomic pointer wrapper.

Wraps C11 _Atomic(void *) with debug tracking fields. The name is registered separately via NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC_PTR, stored in named.c registry (not in this struct).

Usage:

_Atomic(void *) g_ptr = {0};
NAMED_REGISTER_ATOMIC_PTR(&g_ptr, "g_ptr");
atomic_ptr_store(&g_ptr, some_pointer);

Definition at line 106 of file atomic.h.
